summary: Iteration 9 verified router refactor + open-roles sync + HR pagination + setState-in-render fix. All 16 backend regression tests pass. Frontend pagination + login flows all green with zero React warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py successfully split into 3 routers + deps.py. Lint-clean. All /api routes preserved.
sync_open_roles() on startup is idempotent - verified multiple GETs return same 5 canonical titles.
HRLogin/CandidateLogin/CandidateRegister useEffect redirect pattern eliminates the prior 'Cannot update a component while rendering' warning (0 warnings observed across all 3 pages + auth'd revisit).
seed_data_creation: none new; test creates one throwaway TEST_IT9 job (deleted in same test) + one candidate+application per run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor + role sync + pagination + setState fixes all validated. Backend: 5 canonical open roles ('Quality Analyst','Annotator / Associate','Project Coordinator','Project Associate','Global Sales Director'); GET /api/hr/stats returns open_jobs=5, total_applications=170. Frontend: /hr/applications uses data-testids apps-total-count ('170 total · page 1 of 7'), apps-page-indicator ('1 / 7'), apps-page-prev, apps-page-next; 25 rows/page, 7 pages, trust-sorted DESC top=70. Zero React setState-in-render warnings on all login pages.

verified_flows.pagination: verified: 170 total, 7 pages, 25 rows/page, prev/next enable/disable correct, indicator updates
